Our Story

A Name You Can Trust in
Mysuru

Located in Devaraja Mohalla, Lotus Gold Company was started with one simple goal: to give the people of Mysuru a safe, honest, and easy place to sell their gold.

Since 2006, we have helped thousands of families get instant cash for their jewelry or free their gold from high-interest bank loans. We don't guess the price—we use computer testing to give you the exact live market rate for your gold, right in front of your eyes.

Computer Testing

Accurate & Safe Scales

2006

Year Established

10k+

Happy Customers

100%

Honest Process

0%

Hidden Charges

How We Can Help You

We provide Mysuru's fastest and safest gold services.

Sell Gold for Cash

Get instant spot cash for your old or unused gold jewelry. We check the purity in front of you and pay today's live market rate.

Most Popular

Release Pledged Gold

Stuck with a bank gold loan? We will come to the bank with you, pay off your loan, and give you the remaining balance in cash.

Gold Exchange

Want to upgrade your old designs? We evaluate your existing jewelry accurately so you get the most money to buy new gold.

How It Works

Get instant cash for your gold in 3 simple steps.

1

Visit Branch

Bring your gold and valid ID proofs to our secure Mysuru branch.

2

Computer Testing

We test purity accurately without melting or damaging your gold.

3

Instant Cash

Get paid immediately in cash or via direct bank transfer at live rates.

Why Choose Us?

Swipe to see why thousands of families in Mysuru trust Lotus Gold Company.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before visiting our branch.

To keep things safe and legal, please bring your valid Government ID (Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, or Passport) and your PAN Card. We may also ask for one passport-sized photo.

Your gold is 100% safe. We use advanced computer testing machines that check the purity of your gold without melting, rubbing, or damaging it in any way.

We pay you instantly! You can choose Cash (up to legal limits), or we can transfer it directly to your bank account via IMPS, RTGS, or NEFT.

Yes, this is our specialty! Our staff will go to the bank with you, pay off your pending loan, and then give you the remaining cash value of your gold.

What Our Clients Say

Trusted by the people of Mysuru for honest testing, fast payouts, and helpful service.
